reason_for_decision: The article passes because it treats drone detection as a full operating chain from mission definition through sensor ownership, workflow, and commissioning.
strengths: The article begins with mission and airspace definition instead of with sensor shopping, which gives it strong design discipline.
It is especially useful on interface contracts, acceptance testing, and degraded-mode planning.
The commissioning and governance sections make the article more complete than a typical sensor-layer overview.
summary_assessment: This article is a strong pass under the strict workflow. It is practical, well structured, and genuinely useful for teams designing low-altitude detection systems from scratch.
